# SCOPE.CTN

**SCOPE** (SystematiC prOfiling of disease-relevant sPatial nichEs) is a
scalable multi-learning statistical framework that represents tissue
architecture through Cell type-Triad Niches (CTNs), which are
cohort-stable motifs of localized higher-order cell-type interactions.
SCOPE integrates multiple spatial colocalization patterns within a
multi-view learning framework to derive reusable niche vocabularies from
spatially resolved single-cell data.

![SCOPE schematic](reference/figures/SCOPE_schematic.png)

SCOPE schematic

## Installation

Install `SCOPE.CTN` from GitHub:

``` r

install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Build_cell_neighbor_maxdist()`](Build_cell_neighbor_maxdist.md) :
  Constructing neighborhood cell type count and proportion matrices
- [`CLQ_permutation_test()`](CLQ_permutation_test.md) : Computing
  colocation quotient (CLQ) on permutated data
- [`CTN_annotate()`](CTN_annotate.md) : Rename Consolidated CTNs Based
  on Dominant Cell Types
- [`CTN_presence_coxph()`](CTN_presence_coxph.md) : Cox regression on
  patient survival based on CTN presence
- [`color_CTN_names()`](color_CTN_names.md) : Separating cell types in
  CTN labels with colored dots
- [`compute_CLQ_observed()`](compute_CLQ_observed.md) : Computing
  observed colocation quotient (CLQ)
- [`compute_CLQ_permutated()`](compute_CLQ_permutated.md) : Computing
  colocation quotient (CLQ) on permutated data
- [`draw_CTN_celltype()`](draw_CTN_celltype.md) : Spatial Visualization
  of CTNs and Cell Types
- [`draw_CTN_celltype_prop()`](draw_CTN_celltype_prop.md) : CTN cell
  type proportion dotplot
- [`draw_CTN_coxph_logHR()`](draw_CTN_coxph_logHR.md) : Plot Cox
  regression results on patient-level CTN presence
- [`draw_CTN_dendro()`](draw_CTN_dendro.md) : Draw CTN dendrogram
- [`draw_CTN_umap()`](draw_CTN_umap.md) : Visualize CTN cell type
  composition similarity using UMAP
- [`draw_htmap_jaccard_index()`](draw_htmap_jaccard_index.md) : Jaccard
  similarity index heatmap
- [`draw_silhoutte_score()`](draw_silhoutte_score.md) : Visualize
  silhouette score
- [`jaccard()`](jaccard.md) : Compute Jaccard similarity index
- [`jaccard_dist_hclust()`](jaccard_dist_hclust.md) : Perform
  hierarchical clustering on Jaccard distance
- [`run_SCOPE()`](run_SCOPE.md) : Multi-view cell type triad niche
  screening
- [`run_SCOPE_subcluster()`](run_SCOPE_subcluster.md) : Subclustering
  cells labeled as "CTN" in initial analysis
